name: story-circle-demo
publicContext: Scenario mode active: collaborative story circle. The swarm should tell a single story by taking turns. Each bot should contribute one sentence at a time, keep the story coherent, and hand the turn onward.

outcome.prompt: You are evaluating a story-circle swarm run from the event transcript. Judge whether the bots successfully told a coherent story by taking turns with one sentence at a time. Return JSON only with this shape: {"winner":"A|B|C|null","summary":"short summary of the story","bestContributor":"A|B|C|null","specializationWorked":true|false,"finalAnswerProduced":true|false,"rationale":"short explanation"}. Use winner null if no single bot clearly stood out.
